name: Alpha-1: rank residual reversion
description: Cross-sectional rank of (close - open)/open over 5d, inverted = alpha-1 mean revert

name: Alpha-3: -correlation(rank(open), rank(volume), 10)
description: Open-volume disagreement, mean-reverting

name: Alpha-6: -correlation(open, volume, 10)
description: Raw open-volume correlation reversal

name: Alpha-12: sign(delta(volume, 1)) * (-1 * delta(close, 1))
description: Volume-confirmed mean-reverter

name: Alpha-23: high-extension reversal
description: If high > 20d high mean by 2σ, expect mean revert

name: Alpha-41: ((high*low)^0.5 - vwap) / vwap
description: Geometric-mean midprice vs vwap divergence

name: Alpha-54: (-1 * (low - close) * open^5) / ((low - high) * close^5)
description: Microstructure imbalance

name: Alpha-101: ((close - open) / ((high - low) + 0.001))
description: Intraday return normalized by range

name: Realized-vol z-score (60d)
description: Stock-specific vol shock detector

name: Vol term-structure: 20d/60d ratio
description: If 20d vol >> 60d vol, regime breaking

name: Vol-of-vol (60d std of 20d vol)
description: Stocks with chaotic vol get penalized in stable regime
notes: high cross-sectional IC but no top-5 portfolio lift in 9-yr A/B (delta -0.06%/yr)

name: Amihud illiquidity ratio (20d)
description: |return| / dollar_volume averaged over 20d
notes: high cross-sectional IC but no top-5 portfolio lift in 9-yr A/B (delta -0.06%/yr)

name: Kyle's lambda (proxy)
description: Price impact per unit volume
formula: regression slope of |return_1d| on volume_change over 20d

name: 20d turnover skewness
description: Skewed turnover = informed trading
notes: high cross-sectional IC but no top-5 portfolio lift in 9-yr A/B (delta -0.06%/yr) | macro_eval ts_ic=-0.0807 spread=-0.13% n=742

name: Relative-strength rank within sector (20d)
description: Stock's 20d return percentile within sector

name: Sector-residual momentum (20d)
description: Return - sector_return — orthogonalized momentum

name: Sector breadth thrust
description: % of sector members above 20-DMA

name: Month-end effect dummy
description: Last 3 trading days of month often see retail flow

name: Monthly F&O expiry week dummy
description: Last week of month sees position-squaring

name: Earnings-results-week proximity

description: Promoter buying = strong signal

description: Stocks within 5% of 52w-high overreact on bad news (anchoring + loss aversion)

name: Round-number resistance
